chunks.text: IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 1237 of 2020 Piyar Ali Lund and another..............................................Petitioners Versus Province of Sindh and others......................................Respondents Before: Mr. Justice Muhammad Junaid Ghaffar Mr. Justice Zulfiqar Ali Sangi Date of Hearing: 14-12-2021 Date of Decision: 14-12-2021 Mr. Noor Ali Shar, Advocate for the Petitioners. Mr. Shahriyar I. Awan, Assistant A.G-Sindh. O R D E R Muhammad Junaid Ghaffar, J. – Through this Petition, the Petitioners have impugned some appointment process initiated through advertisement dated 20.11.2006 and 17.07.2008. On 20.11.2020, the Petitioners’ Counsel was confronted as to the maintainability of this Petition on the point of laches and apparently no satisfactory response has been given. Even in the memo of Petition, nothing has been stated as to how instant Petition has been filed in the year 2020 in respect of the appointment process and purported interviews conducted as late as 25.10.2008. The instant Petition is hit by laches; whereas, nothing has been stated as to overcome the same, and therefore it is not maintainable. Accordingly, the same stands dismissed. J U D G E J U D G E Ahmad 2
